entries.title: Agentix: An Efficient Serving Engine for LLM Agents as General Programs
entries.fixture_provenance: NSDI 2026 Algorithm 1, Equations 1-2, and anti-starvation rule

fidelity.summary: PLAS/ATLAS queue bands, per-call quanta, demotion, anti-starvation reset, request-to-group accounting, and critical-path updates now match Algorithm 1; KV swap and multi-step execution remain adapter mechanics.

entries.title: Continuum: Efficient and Robust Multi-Turn LLM Agent Scheduling with KV Cache Time-to-Live
policy_kernel: timestamped pin retention and deadlock pin breaking
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2511.02230 Algorithm 1 and Equations 1-2

fidelity.summary: Continuum now implements the empirical-CDF TTL optimizer, timestamped pins, same-program queue protection, TTL-aware FCFS priority, and deadlock pin breaking; physical pinning remains adapter work.

entries.title: KVFlow: Efficient Prefix Caching for Accelerating LLM-Based Multi-Agent Workflows
policy_kernel: prefetch intent with action-feedback transfer state
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2507.07400 Section 3 Agent Step Graph and four-state transfer model

fidelity.summary: KVFlow now consumes validated Agent Step Graph STE facts, applies node-level minimum aggregation, varying-suffix-first reclaim, four transfer states, status-aware scheduling, and enacted prefetch feedback; transfer overlap is adapter evidence.

entries.title: Preble: Efficient Distributed Prompt Scheduling for LLM Serving
policy_kernel: E2 exploit when reusable prefix exceeds uncached prompt
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2407.00023v2 Algorithms 1-3

fidelity.summary: Preble now reproduces E2 Algorithms 1-3, decoder-ratio balancing, rolling-load redirection, weighted local queues, capacity accounting, and prefix-replication intent; physical autoscaling remains deferred.

entries.title: Efficient LLM Serving for Agentic Workflows: A Data Systems Perspective
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2603.16104 Algorithm 1 and token-step cost model

fidelity.summary: Helium now executes validated whole-DAG/TRT plans with worker assignment, nested sequence cursors, dependency and precedence readiness, critical-path traversal, forced progress, and proactive warming; logical-plan rewrite is a host fact producer.

entries.title: Fairness in Serving Large Language Models
entries.source_license: public artifact available; implementation is independent
policy_kernel: enactment-safe dispatch input and decode output charging
entries.fixture_provenance: OSDI 2024 Algorithm 2 and VTC artifact commit 192c2e

fidelity.summary: VTC now implements Algorithm 2 queue entry and idle lifts, per-client FIFO, batch-local tentative counters, enactment-safe input charging, weighted decode charging, and heterogeneous ON/OFF traces.

entries.title: Simple is Better: Multiplication May Be All You Need for LLM Request Scheduling
entries.source_license: public router artifact available; implementation is independent
entries.fixture_provenance: OSDI 2026 multiplicative score, Equations 1-2, and two-phase detector

fidelity.summary: LMetric now implements the exact P-token times (batch size plus one) score, idle boundaries, class-popularity/cache-coverage alarm, 2|M| confirmation, target filtering, and shared capacity accounting.

entries.title: Ensuring Fair LLM Serving Amid Diverse Applications
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2411.15997 Algorithm 1 and Equations 2-3

fidelity.summary: FairServe now implements windowed OIT, interaction preservation, user-scoped counter lifts, and Equations 2-3 application-stage WSC normalization with fixed-point accounting.

entries.title: Marconi: Prefix Caching for the Era of Hybrid LLMs
entries.source_license: public artifact available; implementation is independent
policy_kernel: normalized recency plus alpha FLOP-efficiency eviction
entries.fixture_provenance: MLSys 2025 Sections 4.1-4.3 and artifact commit 08016617

fidelity.summary: Marconi now reproduces speculative radix admission, last-decoded checkpointing, one-child eligibility, accessed-node timestamps, and normalized recency plus alpha FLOP-efficiency eviction; hybrid checkpoint/merge enactment remains deferred.

entries.title: RAGCache: Efficient Knowledge Caching for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2404.12457 Equations 1-3 and Algorithm 1

fidelity.summary: RAGCache now implements two-tier PGDSF clocks, stateful frequency/cost updates, evolving leaf frontiers, swap-once feedback, and cache-aware request ordering; physical hierarchy movement remains adapter evidence.

entries.title: Locality-aware Fair Scheduling in LLM Serving
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2501.14312 Algorithms 1-2

fidelity.summary: DLPM now implements distinct-client refill, locality-first scheduling, feedback-only extend/output debit, persistent per-client and per-worker deficits, longest-prefix worker sets, and capacity accounting.

entries.title: InferCept: Efficient Intercept Support for Augmented Large Language Model Inference
entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: The kernel conflates interception swap priority with resume scheduling and substitutes a non-paper reuse-versus-recompute predicate for preserve/swap/discard waste.

entries.title: PEEK: Predictive Queue-Informed KV Cache Management for LLM Serving
policy_kernel: EMA dynamic fairness lane with stride interleaving
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2607.02525 Equations 1-2 and Algorithm 2

fidelity.summary: PEEK now implements Eq. 1 cLPM sections and keys, optional group-major order, EMA dynamic fairness, stride interleaving, no-sharing FCFS fallback, and Eq. 2 ancestor-demand eviction from validated pending-tree facts.

entries.title: Queue Management for SLO-Oriented Large Language Model Serving
entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: Independent SLO gates and scalar wait ordering do not implement request grouping, RWT estimation, virtual queues or the global LP.

entries.title: SLOs-Serve: Optimized Serving of Multi-SLO LLMs
entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: Independent feasibility gates and least-slack order omit the defining joint DP, performance model, mixed token batches, speculation and best-effort fallback.

entries.title: Efficiently Scaling LLM Reasoning with Certaindex
entries.source_license: public artifact available; implementation is independent
entries.fixture_provenance: paper formula and public artifact interface

fidelity.summary: Thresholded termination remains, but Certaindex computation, stable-answer preservation, program-level knobs, gang scheduling and SJF are absent.

entries.title: Justitia: Fair and Efficient Scheduling of Task-parallel LLM Agents with Selective Pampering
policy_kernel: GPS virtual-time and immutable finish tags
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2510.17015v2 Equations 1-3

fidelity.summary: Justitia now implements memory-centric KV token-time cost, active-set GPS virtual time, immutable finish tags, grouped ready-branch pampering, and consumed-cost feedback; physical co-execution remains deferred.

entries.title: Chameleon: Adaptive Caching and Scheduling for Many-Adapter LLM Inference Environments
entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: Queue hints exist, but token quotas, two-phase redistribution, head-of-line bypass and the cost-aware adapter cache are absent.

entries.title: HotPrefix: Hotness-Aware KV Cache Scheduling for Efficient Prefix Sharing in LLM Inference Systems
entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: A cumulative-count threshold at primary admission does not implement clocked GPU leaf eviction, host admission or host-to-GPU promotion.

entries.title: PARD: Enhancing Goodput for Inference Pipeline via Proactive Request Dropping
policy_kernel: Equation-3 linear and DAG latency projection
entries.fixture_provenance: EuroSys 2026 Equations 1-3 and Section 4.3 DEPQ hysteresis

fidelity.summary: PARD now implements Equation 3 for linear and DAG pipelines, capability-guarded proactive drops, remaining-budget DEPQ, load-factor HBF/LBF hysteresis, and feedback-smoothed estimator state.

entries.title: Regulating Branch Parallelism in LLM Serving
entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: A static group cap does not implement TAPER's protected token, slack-budgeted widening and marginal utility planner; cancellation contradicts reversible deferral.

entries.title: DualMap: Enabling Both Cache Affinity and Load Balancing for Distributed LLM Serving
entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: Cache-hit and risk vocabulary is present, but two-choice hashing, SLO switching and benefit-ranked queued rebalancing are absent.

entries.title: Llumnix: Dynamic Scheduling for Large Language Model Serving
entries.source_license: public artifact available; implementation is independent

fidelity.summary: One virtual-usage scalar omits Llumnix freeness, usage rules, pairing, victim selection and migration coordination.

entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2607.08565 Figure 13 pseudocode

fidelity.summary: SMetric now matches Figure 13 first-turn round-robin load balancing, guarded follow-up stickiness, overload and likely-eviction fallback, post-fallback sessions, and aggregate capacity; global-tier transfer remains deferred.

entries.fixture_provenance: independent reference model from the paper

fidelity.summary: Generic lookahead, rank and next-use scalars do not implement lineage-aware caching, OOM-safe headroom routing or dynamic graph priority.

fidelity.summary: Quality-gap/cost ordering is not GoodServe's E2E-SLO goodput objective or just-enough GPU selection.

Eq.1 WA-LRU with pressure-scaled tool TTL

entries.title: RouteBalance: Fused Model Routing and Load Balancing for Heterogeneous LLM Serving
policy_kernel: LPT greedy assignment with pending-decode dead reckoning
entries.fixture_provenance: arXiv 2606.17949 Equations 1-2 and Algorithm 1
